message:
feat(cli/robot): add structured health probe assessments for doctor diagnostics

robot.rs:
- Add HealthProbeAssessment struct with probe details, unhealthy, and
  degraded flags for structured health evaluation
- Add summarize_db_file_sanity_probe() that runs the doctor's sqlite
  file sanity check and maps results to assessment flags, distinguishing
  between healthy, degraded (absolute-fallback used), and unhealthy states
- Expand robot doctor mode with comprehensive health probe collection
  including db file sanity, schema validation, integrity metrics, and
  startup probe integration (~300 new lines)

lib.rs:
- Add reservation_patterns_overlap() wrapper using cached CompiledPattern
  for efficient glob-vs-glob intersection checks in reservation commands
- Add cli_reservation_path_filter_matches() and
  cli_reservation_target_matches() helpers for consistent filter logic

pattern_overlap.rs:
- Expand CompiledPattern with additional overlap detection edge cases
  and improved documentation

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
